name: pictor-lib

metadata.name: pictor-lib
metadata.summary: An image processings library wrapper based on Python Pillow

documentation:
# Pictor Lib

[![Pylint](https://github.com/huangyunict/pictor_lib/actions/workflows/pylint.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/huangyunict/pictor_lib/actions/workflows/pylint.yml)
[![Python application](https://github.com/huangyunict/pictor_lib/actions/workflows/python-app.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/huangyunict/pictor_lib/actions/workflows/python-app.yml)

Pictor Library provide help classes and functions Python image processing library Pillow.

modules.name: pictor_lib.pictor_type
documentation: Module that defines common typing for other classes.

modules.name: pictor_lib.pictor_position
documentation: Module that defines the PictorPosition class.

classes.name: pictor_lib.pictor_position.PictorPosition

methods.name: pictor_lib.pictor_position.PictorPosition.x
documentation: The x property.

methods.name: pictor_lib.pictor_position.PictorPosition.y
documentation: The y property.
Wrap 2d position (x, y).

modules.name: pictor_lib.pictor_size
documentation: Module that defines the PictorSize class.

classes.name: pictor_lib.pictor_size.PictorSize

methods.name: pictor_lib.pictor_size.PictorSize.width
documentation: The width property.

methods.name: pictor_lib.pictor_size.PictorSize.height
documentation: The height property.

methods.name: pictor_lib.pictor_size.PictorSize.set_width
documentation: Set the width property and return a new instance.

methods.name: pictor_lib.pictor_size.PictorSize.set_height
documentation: Set the height property and return a new instance.

methods.name: pictor_lib.pictor_size.PictorSize.scale
documentation: Return a new size instance by scaling the width and height by given ratio.

methods.name: pictor_lib.pictor_size.PictorSize.scale_width
documentation: Return a new size instance by scaling the width by given ratio.

methods.name: pictor_lib.pictor_size.PictorSize.scale_height
documentation: Return a new size instance by scaling the height by given ratio.

methods.name: pictor_lib.pictor_size.PictorSize.shrink_to_square
documentation: Return a new size instance by shrinking the longer side to the shorter side.

methods.name: pictor_lib.pictor_size.PictorSize.expand_to_square
documentation: Return a new size instance by expanding the shorter side to the longer side.

methods.name: pictor_lib.pictor_size.PictorSize.__add__
documentation: Return a new size instance by adding another size object to the current object.

methods.name: pictor_lib.pictor_size.PictorSize.__sub__
documentation: Return a new size instance by subtracting another size object from the current object.

methods.name: pictor_lib.pictor_size.PictorSize.__mul__
documentation: Return a new size instance by scaling the width and height by given ratio.
Wrap 2d size (width x height).
